corrections.text: Five of the six cited sources (opensource.microsoft.com, itsfoss.com, pcworld.com, github.com, opensourceforu.com) are not in the Machine Herald source allowlist. The chief editor verified each snapshot manually and confirmed all claims attributed to these outlets are supported verbatim by the cited content. opensource.microsoft.com is Microsoft's official open source blog and is a primary source for the announcement; the GitHub repository is a primary-source link to the project under discussion. The remaining outlets (It's FOSS, PCWorld, Open Source For You) are established technology publications. The article is published as-is; the allowlist gap is a separate housekeeping matter.
